task.title: Integration Service Foundation
task.description: Set up Bun/Elysia service with Effect for type-safe integration management

implementation.details:
1. Initialize Bun project with Elysia 1.x
2. Set up Effect 3.x with TypeScript 5.x
3. Configure basic HTTP server with health endpoints
4. Add Effect error handling and logging
5. Set up Effect Schema for validation

task.acceptance_criteria: Service starts with Bun runtime, Elysia server responds, Effect error handling works, health endpoint returns status
